variants: Teagan Hartsfield currently resides in Starcaller Crescent, where the vibrant atmosphere fuels her creativity. She hails from Gingerbark Fields, the place of her birth, and cultivated her artistic talents at the Moonspire Arts Institute. Following her graduation, Teagan joined Thornfield Transport, quickly becoming a respected member of the team through her innovative contributions. Her dedication to her craft was recognized when she received the esteemed Dawnbringer Emblem for her significant achievements in the industry.
